instruction: Write an email to your professor to ask for an extension on a project due in two days. The email must include the following constraints: it should be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience. The email must contain exactly 150-200 words and include at least two reasons for requesting the extension, with one reason providing specific background details. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once, and the keyword "deadline" must appear at least twice. The email should be formatted with a clear subject line, a proper salutation, a concise body, and a polite closing. Additionally, ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand. The email must contain at least 300 words.
response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Extension on Upcoming Project Submission

Dear Professor Anderson,

I hope this message finds you well and that your week is proceeding smoothly. I am writing to you today with a somewhat difficult request regarding the group project that is officially due in exactly two days. I have been working diligently on this assignment for the past several weeks, and I have always taken great care to meet every single deadline you have set for our class. However, due to an unexpected combination of personal circumstances and a sudden family emergency, I find myself unable to complete the final revisions by the current deadline.

Firstly, my grandmother was hospitalized unexpectedly last night, requiring my immediate presence and support during the critical early hours of the morning and throughout the day. This situation has created a significant emotional burden that has made it impossible for me to focus on my academic work as I normally would. Secondly, and perhaps more specifically, I discovered a major error in my data analysis yesterday afternoon that requires a complete re-evaluation of the entire dataset. This issue stems from a software update that occurred over the weekend, which corrupted several of my original files. Fixing this problem requires extensive time to re-run simulations and verify the new results, a process that cannot be rushed without compromising the quality of our final presentation.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause you and for not informing you sooner about these developing issues. I understand that time is of the essence, and I am fully committed to delivering a high-quality submission that meets the rigorous standards of your course. Would it be possible to grant me a forty-eight-hour extension to ensure that I can address these technical challenges and provide a thorough, accurate report? I am willing to discuss this further at your earliest convenience or to provide any additional documentation regarding my family situation if required.

Thank you very much for your time, your understanding, and your continued dedication to our education. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Respectfully,

Jordan Lee
Student ID: 12345678
Department of Computer Science

Conflicts between Length Constraints.new_constraint: The email must contain at least 300 words.
Conflicts between Length Constraints.org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 150-200 words.
